form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign when last of 14 at Sha Tin March 30 2025 over 2000m, 19 len behind Mighty Strength carrying 57.5kg at $45. Previously first up; ran last of 12 at Happy Valley September 18 2024 over 1800m, 5.5 len behind Forever Glorious carrying 58kg at $80. Might be better off following this run.

form.formComment: Returns from a 43-day let-up. Most recently ran last of 11 at this track on February 22 over 2060m, on a slow track; 5.5 len behind Overdraft carrying 59kg at $8.20. Before that was well back until straightening; raced back then made ground from the turn; won by a 0.1 len at Otaki February 8 over 1600m in soft going defeating Ribella Rose with 58.5kg at $5.20. Shapes up nicely.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Returns from a 44-day let-up. At the latest run tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 12 at Otaki Rating 65 on February 21 over 1600m, on a slow track; 1.3 len behind The Exponent with 55.5kg at $12.90. The race before that 4th of 9 at Reefton on January 7 over 1400m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Grand Cru carrying 57.5kg at $2.20. Making headway. Should go well again.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start won by a 0.5 len at this track March 14 over 1600m in soft going defeating Glimmer carrying 55.5kg at $7. The race before that rolled along in front before being edged out 2nd of 9 at Tauherenikau on March 5 over 1600m, slow going 1.75 len behind Plain Sailing carrying 55kg at $8.80. Capable enough on her day and is one of the major players.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of six-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign when last of 11 at Te Aroha September 21 over 2200m, on rain affected going; 14 len behind Joejoeccini with 68kg at $4.10. First up last campaign fifth of 14 at Trentham May 17 over 1600m, soft track; 6 len behind Mohi Place carrying 58.5kg at $4.50. Will take great benefit from this run.
